---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? What limitation of OrchFlow are you encountering?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other approaches? Why did you choose this one?

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Mockup (optional)

If applicable, include a wireframe, diagram, or code snippet showing the desired behavior.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references to the PRD (`ORCHFLOW_PRD.md`), or links to related issues.
